/usr/bin/ar qc libStopPow.a CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_Plasma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_PartialIoniz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_LP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_BetheBloch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_SRIM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_AZ.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_Mehlhorn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_Grabowski.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_Zimmerman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_BPS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/StopPow_Fit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/PlotGen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/AtomicData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/Spectrum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StopPow.dir/src/Fit.cpp.o
/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/llvm-ranlib libStopPow.a
